response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate has minimal C++ experience—only a brief stint at National Instruments—and no demonstrable expertise in core requirements like industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), message brokers, multi-threaded C++ systems, or industrial protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus). The resume is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies, with no evidence of scalable on-premises/cloud industrial automation systems development.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and cloud technologies
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and deliver complex systems end-to-end
concerns: Lacks recent or substantial C++/STL experience required for core role
No evidence of IEC 62443, industrial IoT, or embedded systems security practices
No demonstrated use of message brokers, multi-threaded C++ architectures, or industrial protocols
